eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Oldham, TX; at 04:35 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 05:05 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Oldham County Emergency Management: A fire warning has been issued for this area. There is a dangerous wildfire 4 miles NE of Boys Ranch or 24 miles SW of Dumas. Smoke and fire will present a threat to life and property. Be prepared to evacuate quickly if requested by local officials.
